markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX for GigaML's urgent content and GTM needs.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Urgent Need:** GigaML, a new AI infrastructure player, needs to build brand from scratch to disrupt legacy competitors (Sierra, Decagon, Parloa) and accelerate its GTM.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [**GrowthX Fit:** GrowthX's AI-driven content engine (5 articles/week) and proven technical content success (e.g., Augment Code's 3x organic traffic) directly address GigaML's requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [**Decision:** GigaML will sign a standard GrowthX agreement immediately to secure a Feb 23 kickoff, with plans to scope custom workstreams (industry content, thought leadership) during the initial strategy sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)

## Topics

### GigaML's Challenge: Building a Brand from Zero

  - [GigaML is a new AI infrastructure player building brand from scratch to disrupt legacy service-side competitors (Sierra, Decagon, Parloa).](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [**Primary Need:** A high-volume, automated content engine to build SEO and brand authority quickly.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
      - [**Narrative:** Shift from generic service-side messaging to a technical, efficiency-focused story (compute, memory, process).](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
      - [**Audiences:**](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
          - [**Enterprise:** CTO/CIO pillars, Customer Support Ops, VPs of AI.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
          - [**Down Market:** CEOs, CTOs, Customer Support/CX leaders.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
          - [**Key Influencers:** Engineers and Product Managers (hard to find; LinkedIn Sales Nav is a potential channel).](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
      - [**Workstreams:**](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
          - [**Core:** 5 articles/week for SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
          - [**Custom:** Industry-specific content, executive thought leadership (Kyle's brand).](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### GrowthX's Solution: An AI-Driven Content Engine

  - [GrowthX is an end-to-end partner for AI-driven content strategy and execution.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [**Two-Phase Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (8-week Strategy Sprint):** Calibrate on quality and roadmap. Includes an opt-out clause before the full 12-month agreement.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Growth Execution):** Publish 5 articles/week, manage CMS, and monitor LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [**Proven Success (Augment Code Case Study):**](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
      - [**Result:** 3x organic traffic (20k → 60k/month) and near-zero paid spend.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
      - [**Method:** Published \>130 technical guides with code snippets, driving high-intent keywords like "best AI coding tools for enterprise."](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
      - [**Significance:** This technical success directly validates GrowthX's ability to execute GigaML's desired content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
      - [Send the standard GrowthX contract to Morgan.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
      - [Send onboarding docs (e.g., ICP templates) to Morgan.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
      - [Send the Augment Code SEMrush chart screenshot to Morgan.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up call between Morgan and Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [**Morgan:**](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
      - [Sign the contract to secure the **Feb 23 kickoff date**.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
      - [Complete and return onboarding docs.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
      - [Prepare a "good, better, best" proposal for custom workstreams.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
      - [Book the call with Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/tVXDj_7KkFiEo8FRrHU39DwJiy7XSmtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
